understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding spikes that immediately end the attempt, and doing so within the limited turns/attempts to ultimately win the game by clearing levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn I could MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only); after the horizontal step, gravity automatically carried the character in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile, hitting a hazard (like spikes 'u'/'v'), or reaching the goal '+'. CLICK could be used to interact with/remove clickable breakable tiles ('x') at a specified [x,y] without moving the player, typically to open or change fall paths. UNDO would revert the previous action. Reaching spikes ended the run immediately; reaching '+' completed the level. Each level allowed 2 attempts with a 50-turn budget per attempt.
